name: orgx-codex-plugin
description: OrgX MCP access and initiative-aware Codex skills for operating inside OrgX workstreams.

interface.shortDescription: Install OrgX MCP and initiative-aware workflows in Codex.
interface.longDescription: Bundles OrgX MCP configuration, Codex skills, and runtime hook templates for initiative orchestration, passive Work Graph reconciliation, artifact registration, and human-in-the-loop decision flows.
defaultPrompt: Use OrgX to show me what needs my approval right now.
Use OrgX to scaffold this goal into workstreams, milestones, and tasks.
